chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 4384 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 6737/26. (U/A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.03.2026 Ms. Nida Zafar Khokhar, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---------- 1. Granted. 2. Learned counsel for the Petitioner states on instructions that the Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
